title: NAMI SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: NATIONAL ALLIANCE ON MENTAL ILLNESS CLACKAMAS NAMI SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health support groups. The groups are facilitated by trained volunteers with a focus on LGBTQ2+ individuals, veterans, families, and parents. 10202 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 501 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals with mental health conditions and their families, support groups may have additional requirements Hours: Varies by support group Email (503) 344-5050 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 344-5050 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-6pm by appointment only Services: LGBTQ2+ Support Groups Mental Health Related Support Groups Mental Health Related Support Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Parent Support Groups Suicide Loss Survivors Support Groups Women's Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL ALLIANCE ON MENTAL ILLNESS CLACKAMAS
